mapper.select: select * from PRODUCT_APPROVAL_REQUEST where request_status not in 'APPROVED'
mapper.update: update PRODUCT_REQUESTS set request_status = #{status}, approver_id = #{admin_id} where product_id = #{product_id}
update products set approve_status = #{status}, approver = #{admin_id} where product_id = #{product_id}
update admin_users set password = #{password}, department = #{department}, admin_pw = #{admin_pw}, name = #{name}, admin_role = #{admin_role} where admin_id = #{admin_id}

update users set password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, birth = #{birth}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, e_name = #{e_name}, postal_code = #{postal_code}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{address_detail} where user_id = #{user_id}
